description_long: This is a single-story bungalow set within a large, grassy plot, surrounded by scattered trees and what appear to be small garden plots or gravestones. The building itself is rectangular with a prominent central structure and a series of smaller extensions or wings. The roof is pitched and appears to be gabled, with a clear ridge running along the length of the main structure. Pathways and driveways are visible leading up to the building, and the surrounding grounds are open and well-maintained. The exterior is primarily light gray, likely stone or concrete, with darker roofing material and some paved areas adjacent to the structure.
description: A single-story, rectangular bungalow with a gabled roof, set in a spacious grassy area with scattered trees and pathways.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the full layout of the bungalow, surrounding grassy grounds, trees, and pathways.
description_view_1: Side profile view highlighting the thinness of the asset and the elevation of the bungalow above the ground.
description_view_2: Reverse top-down view showing the rear of the bungalow and more of the surrounding landscape and pathways.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile view, again emphasizing the building's elevation and the flatness of the terrain.
